channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hegseth to campaign for Massie opponent ahead of Kentucky primary
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth will appear in a personal capacity at a rally for congressional candidate Ed Gallrein, who is challenging Representative Thomas Massie.

item.title: CBP seizes 100 million lethal fentanyl doses at southwest border
Trump's Taiwan 'negotiating chip' comment raises concerns about US-China policy shift
item.description: President Donald Trump suggested a $14 billion Taiwan weapons package could be used as leverage in China talks, drawing criticism from Taiwan.

item.title: House panel to question guard about Epstein's jail death
item.description: House Republicans are deepening their investigation into Jeffrey Epstein's 2019 death, with a former federal prison guard set to be questioned.
